calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against defendant Quality SF Roofing, (A Corporation) aka Quality SF Roofing.

Dept.:505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:18:37 a.m. and concluding at 9:26:28 a.m.(D505)

Tiffanie Brown, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.via Zoom Video Conference
Defendant Quality SF Roofing, (A Corporation) aka Quality SF Roofing not appearing.
Witness Luther Jao, sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, et al filed March 16, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant filed on January 4, 2024
Default entered as to Defendant on January 18, 2024
Dismissal filed as to Defendant does 1 through 10 inclusive on January 31, 2024.
Motion of Prove Up Hearing filed January 31, 2024.

Counsel to provide summary of causes of action and an offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Court addresses witness and confirms that the declaration made and exhibits submitted are true and correct.

After reviewing the declarations and evidence, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant the following:
Damages $72,760.46
Interest $8,851.06
Attorney's Fees $1,200.00
Costs $705.85
Total Judgment $83,517.37

Proposed judgment comports to proof, the Court signs and judgment is executed this day.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
